description.p: The baboon has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

sheet.description: The baboon has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

description.p: The cat’s jump distance is determined using its Dexterity rather than its Strength.

sheet.description: The cat’s jump distance is determined using its Dexterity rather than its Strength.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

description.p: The crab can breathe air and water.

sheet.description: The crab can breathe air and water.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage

description.p: The deer doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

sheet.description: The deer doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Slashing damage.

description.p: The frog can breathe air and water

sheet.description: The frog can breathe air and water

description.p: The frog’s Long Jump is up to 10 feet and its High Jump is up to 5 feet with or without a running start.

sheet.description: The frog’s Long Jump is up to 10 feet and its High Jump is up to 5 feet with or without a running start.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage

description.p: The beetle sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

sheet.description: The beetle sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Fire damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Fire damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage, or the goat deals 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage if the goat moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage, or the goat deals 2 (1d4) Bludgeoning damage if the goat moved 20+ feet straight toward the target immediately before the hit.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

description.p: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

sheet.description: The hyena has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d6) Piercing damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Weapon Attack: +1, reach 5 ft. Hit: 3 (1d4 - 1) Piercing damage.

description.p: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

sheet.description: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

description.p: The octopus can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

sheet.description: The octopus can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch without expending extra movement to do so.

description.p: The octopus can breathe only underwater.

sheet.description: The octopus can breathe only underwater.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Bludgeoning damage.

description.p: Trigger: A creature ends its turn within 5 feet of the octopus while underwater. Response: The octopus releases ink that fills a 5-foot Cube centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

sheet.description: Trigger: A creature ends its turn within 5 feet of the octopus while underwater. Response: The octopus releases ink that fills a 5-foot Cube centered on itself, and the octopus moves up to its Swim Speed. The Cube is Heavily Obscured for 1 minute or until a strong current or similar effect disperses the ink.

description.p: The owl doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

sheet.description: The owl doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks when it flies out of an enemy’s reach.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +3, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Slashing damage.

description.p: The piranha can breathe only underwater.

sheet.description: The piranha can breathe only underwater.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5 (with Advantage if the target doesn't have all its Hit Points), reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

description.p: The rat doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks when it moves out of an enemy’s reach.

sheet.description: The rat doesn’t provoke Opportunity Attacks when it moves out of an enemy’s reach.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

description.p: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

sheet.description: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a whisper or chitter. A hearer can discern the sounds are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

description.p: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

sheet.description: The seahorse can breathe only underwater.

description.p: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

sheet.description: While underwater, the seahorse moves up to its Swim Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

description.p: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

sheet.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

description.p: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the spider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

sheet.description: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the spider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

description.p: The vulture has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

sheet.description: The vulture has Advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 feet of the creature and the ally doesn't have the Incapacitated condition.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 2 (1d4) Piercing damage.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

setters.set: Darkvision 120 ft. (unimpeded by magical Darkness); Passive Perception 11

description.p: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

sheet.description: The imp has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) Poison damage.

description.p: The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

sheet.description: The imp casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

description.p: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it’s wearing or carrying isn’t transformed.

sheet.description: The imp shape-shifts to resemble a rat (Speed 20 ft.), a raven (20 ft., Fly 60 ft.), or a spider (20 ft., Climb 20 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it’s wearing or carrying isn’t transformed.

setters.set: Blindsight 10 ft., Darkvision 60 ft.; Passive Perception 15
Understands Common and Draconic but can’t speak

description.p: The pseudodragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

sheet.description: The pseudodragon has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

description.p: The pseudodragon makes two Bite attacks.

sheet.description: The pseudodragon makes two Bite attacks.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage.

description.p: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the pseudodragon can see within 5 feet. Failure: 5 (2d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. Failure by 5 or More: The Poisoned target also has the Unconscious condition until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to shake it awake.

sheet.description: Constitution Saving Throw: DC 12, one creature the pseudodragon can see within 5 feet. Failure: 5 (2d4) Poison damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition for 1 hour. Failure by 5 or More: The Poisoned target also has the Unconscious condition until it takes damage or a creature within 5 feet of it takes an action to shake it awake.

description.p: The quasit has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

sheet.description: The quasit has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the quasit’s next turn.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage, and the target has the Poisoned condition until the start of the quasit’s next turn.

description.p: The quasit casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

sheet.description: The quasit casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

description.p: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 20 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically

sheet.description: Wisdom Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 20 feet. Failure: The target has the Frightened condition. At the end of each of its turns, the target repeats the save, ending the effect on itself on a success. After 1 minute, it succeeds automatically

description.p: The quasit shape-shifts to resemble a bat (Speed 10 ft., Fly 40 ft.), a centipede (40 ft., Climb 40 ft.), or a toad (40 ft., Swim 40 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed.

sheet.description: The quasit changes into a form that resembles a bat (Speed 10 ft., Fly 40 ft.), a centipede (40 ft., Climb 40 ft.), or a toad (40 ft., Swim 40 ft.), or it returns to its true form. Its statistics are the same in each form, except for its Speed. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn’t transformed.

setters.set: Understands Common plus one other language but can’t speak

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

description.p: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +5, range 80/320 ft. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) Piercing damage.

description.p: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

sheet.description: The slaad has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) Piercing damage.

description.p: The sphinx has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

sheet.description: The sphinx has Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +5, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) Slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) Radiant damage.

description.p: Trigger: The sphinx or another creature within 30 feet makes an ability check or a saving throw. Response: The sphinx adds 2 to the roll.

sheet.description: Trigger: The sphinx or another creature within 30 feet makes an ability check or a saving throw. Response: The sphinx adds 2 to the roll.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +6, reach 5 ft. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) Piercing damage.

description.p: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 40/160 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the sprite’s next turn.

sheet.description: Ranged Attack Roll: +6, range 40/160 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage, and the target has the Charmed condition until the start of the sprite’s next turn.

description.p: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see. Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save. Failure: The sprite knows the target’s emotions and alignment.

sheet.description: Charisma Saving Throw: DC 10, one creature within 5 feet the sprite can see. Celestials, Fiends, and Undead automatically fail the save. Failure: The sprite knows the target’s emotions and alignment.

description.p: The sprite casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

sheet.description: The sprite casts Invisibility on itself, requiring no spell components and using Charisma as the spellcasting ability.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) Piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) Poison damage.
